setup.note: Official Google Cloud BigQuery remote MCP server. Enable the BigQuery API, verify billing where required, grant MCP Tool User (roles/mcp.toolUser) and product IAM permissions, then create a Google OAuth 2.0 client in Google Auth Platform. Register FlexiGPT's OAuth redirect URL exactly. If FlexiGPT uses a random loopback port, set a fixed OAuth loopback listen address first. Common scopes include https://www.googleapis.com/auth/bigquery or https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform. References: https://docs.cloud.google.com/mcp/configure-mcp-ai-application and https://docs.cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/use-bigquery-mcp

inputs.label: Google OAuth Client
inputs.description: OAuth client ID and client secret from Google Auth Platform.
inputs.note: Use the OAuth redirect URL shown by FlexiGPT. For loopback redirects, use a fixed callback port so the Google OAuth client can be registered exactly.
